question: Identify high-priority unresolved risks in MLL and create a risk checkpoint event with explicit owner follow-up.

arguments.jql: project = MLL AND priority in (Highest, High) AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY updated DESC

arguments.description: High-priority unresolved sprint risks from Jira (MLL).

question: Surface MLL blocker/dependency tickets still open and schedule a dependency synchronization call.

arguments.jql: project = MLL AND labels in (blocker, dependency) AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority DESC, updated DESC

arguments.description: Blocker and dependency alignment from open MLL Jira tickets.

question: Find active incident and critical bug hotspots in MLL and book a triage war-room.

arguments.jql: project = MLL AND issuetype in (Bug, Incident) AND priority in (Highest, High) AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY created DESC

arguments.summary: MLL Incident and Bug Hotspot Triage
arguments.description: Critical incidents/bugs triage from Jira MLL query.

question: Assess MLL release readiness based on open release-tagged work and schedule go/no-go.

arguments.jql: project = MLL AND labels in (release, readiness, go-live) AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority DESC, updated DESC

arguments.description: Release readiness checkpoint linked to open release Jira work.

question: Extract unresolved data quality and data drift debt items from MLL and schedule remediation planning.

arguments.jql: project = MLL AND text ~ "data quality" AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY updated DESC

arguments.description: Remediation session for unresolved data quality/drift debt.

question: Query MLL model drift and performance regression tickets still open, then create a drift watch review event.

arguments.jql: project = MLL AND (text ~ "drift" OR text ~ "regression") AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY updated DESC

arguments.description: Review of active model drift and performance regression issues.

question: Find blocked experiment/pipeline tickets for MLL and arrange unblock workshop.

arguments.jql: project = MLL AND (text ~ "pipeline" OR text ~ "experiment") AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY updated DESC

arguments.description: Unblock workshop for open experiment and pipeline constraints.

question: Surface unresolved MLL security/compliance issues and create a compliance checkpoint.

arguments.jql: project = MLL AND (text ~ "security" OR text ~ "compliance" OR labels in (security, compliance)) AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority DESC, updated DESC

arguments.description: Checkpoint for unresolved security/compliance Jira issues.

question: Build a dependency map from unresolved MLL tickets referencing external teams and schedule cross-team sync.

arguments.jql: project = MLL AND text ~ "dependency" AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY updated DESC

arguments.description: Cross-team planning from unresolved dependency tickets.

question: Find open retrospective action items in MLL and create closure planning event.

arguments.jql: project = MLL AND text ~ "retrospective" AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY updated DESC

arguments.description: Closure planning for open retrospective action items.
